title: Wacky Weekend: Strange Birds
description: This is definitely for the birds! Our feathered friends come in lots of different shapes, sizes, and colors. Take a gander at the photo gallery below to see some of the weirdest winged creatures ever caught on camera!

title: Wacky Weekend: Animal Costumes
description: Humans aren't the only ones dressing up for Halloween. Dogs and cats are trick-or-treating as well! Check out animals wearing wacky costumes in the photo gallery below.

title: Wacky Weekend: Zany Pets
description: Pets can do some pretty funny things! Check out the household animals getting a little silly in the photo gallery below. (These pets like being wacky, but yours may not. Never force your pet to do something it does not want to do.)

title: Wacky Weekend: Chocolate Concoctions
description: No bronze or marble here! Chocolate is the tasty material used to create these sculptures of animals, people, clothing, and more.

title: Wacky Weekend: Hearts in Nature

title: Wacky Weekend: Snow Sculptures
description: Snowmen are cool and all, but you can create lots of things with frozen flakes—like these brr-illiant snow sculptures. Check out the photo gallery below before it melts!

description: Don’t toss that tomato just because it’s not perfect! Usually an "ugly" fruit or vegetable tastes just as good. Check out the unusual looks of the foods in the photo gallery below.

description: Nope, these aren’t actually ghosts! They’re animals with rare conditions that affect their natural pigment, or coloration, so that they’re white. Check out bats, gorillas, alligators, and other eerily odd animals in the photo gallery below.

title: Wacky Weekend: Wild Cats
description: Here’s something to meow about: The world is home to 37 different kinds of wild cats. Check out some of the fantastic felines—like the jaguar, lion, and leopard—in the photo gallery below.

title: Wacky Weekend: Animal Eyes
